loop1.title: Fuel Tank Anatomy
loop1.note: This meter (dg_1_mfm) measures electrical parameters (power, current, voltage) but does not log fuel-specific quantities (fuel level, fuel temperature, fuel flow rate, or efficiency). The card renders its metadata frame with honest blanks for the fuel data.

loop1.title: All Runs (Fuel Log)
loop1.note: Showing total energy and average load — fuel consumption, run hours, starts, and faults are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Fuel & Tank — Composite
loop1.note: Showing active power and efficiency/load — fuel level, burn rate, temperature, SFC, and cost are not measured by this asset's electrical meter.
